scripts.run:all: bun run verify:plan && bun run fetch:phase1 && bun run fetch:raw-candidates && bun run audit:raw-tools && bun run build:diana-template && bun run verify:diana-raw && bun run build:raw-samplesheets && bun run smoke:raw && bun run build:alignment-smoke && bun run smoke:alignment && bun run fetch:human-reference-smoke && bun run smoke:human-reference && bun run fetch:full-reference-smoke && bun run smoke:full-reference && bun run fetch:production-somatic && bun run smoke:production-somatic && bun run fetch:full-wes && bun run benchmark:full-wes && bun run fetch:phase3-wgs && bun run validate:phase3-wgs && bun run verify:orthogonal && bun run build:panel && bun run analyze:hrd && bun run analyze:rna && bun run build:packet && bun run verify:outputs
scripts.nf:phase3-fetch:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile local --workflow phase3_fetch --phase3_reads full --phase3_fetch_concurrency 4 --phase3_aria2_split 1
scripts.nf:phase3-wgs:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile local --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads full
scripts.nf:aws:quick:stub: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow quick -stub-run
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-fetch:dev: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_fetch --phase3_reads 500000 --phase3_fetch_cpus 4 --phase3_fetch_memory '16 GB'
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-sra-benchmark: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_sra_benchmark --phase3_fetch_cpus 4 --phase3_fetch_memory '16 GB' --phase3_fetch_concurrency 8 --sra_benchmark_bytes 268435456 --sra_benchmark_parts 4
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-fetch:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_fetch --phase3_reads full --phase3_source_mode aws_sra --phase3_fetch_cpus 8 --phase3_fetch_memory '48 GB' --phase3_fetch_concurrency 2
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-wgs:dev: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads 500000
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-wgs:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads full --phase3_source_mode aws_sra --phase3_fetch_concurrency 2
